org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class AbstractEnvironment<AT extends Agent>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.AbstractEnvironment<AT>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Environment<AT>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractSituatedEnvironment
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public abstract class AbstractEnvironment<AT extends Agent>
extends Object
implements Environment<AT>
    Abstract environment model.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractEnvironment

        public AbstractEnvironment(TimeManager time_manager)
        Deprecated. 

    • Method Detail

      • isAlive

        public boolean isAlive()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if this environment is alive.

        If the environment is not alive, the multiagent kernel will quit.

        Specified by:
        isAlive in interface Environment<AT extends Agent>

      • killMe

        protected void killMe()
        Deprecated. 
        Notify the kernel that this environment is requesting to be killed.

        When a situated environment desappear, all the agents inside will be killed also.

      • init

        public void init()
        Deprecated. 
        Initialize this environment.
        Specified by:
        init in interface Environment<AT extends Agent>

      • shutdown

        public void shutdown()
        Deprecated. 
        Shutdown this environment.
        Specified by:

        public abstract void putAgent(AT agent)
        Deprecated. 
        Put the given agent inside the environment.

        public abstract void removeAgent(AgentIdentifier agent)
        Deprecated.

      • preAgentScheduling

        public void preAgentScheduling(Kernel<AT,?,?,?> runningKernel)
        Deprecated. 
        This function os called by the called before the on scheduling step of the agents.
        Specified by:
        preAgentScheduling in interface Environment<AT extends Agent>
        Parameters:
        runningKernel - is the instance of the kernel that is running this environment.

      • postAgentScheduling

        public void postAgentScheduling(Kernel<AT,?,?,?> runningKernel)
        Deprecated. 
        This function os called by the called after the on scheduling step of the agents.
        Specified by:
        postAgentScheduling in interface Environment<AT extends Agent>
        Parameters:
        runningKernel - is the instance of the kernel that is running this environment.

      • getSimulationTime

        public final double getSimulationTime(TimeUnit desired_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the current date of simulation.

        The unit depends on the environment's implementation.

        Parameters:
        desired_unit - indicates the unit to use
        Returns:
        the simulation's time espressed in the specified unit.

      • getSimulationTime

        public final double getSimulationTime()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the current date of simulation.

        The unit depends on the environment's implementation.

        Returns:
        the simulation's time espressed in seconds.

      • getSimulationStepDuration

        public final double getSimulationStepDuration(TimeUnit desired_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.
        Parameters:
        desired_unit - indicates the unit to use
        Returns:
        the simulation's step time.

      • getSimulationStepDuration

        public final double getSimulationStepDuration()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.
        Returns:
        the simulation's step time.

      • getSimulationClock

        public final SimulationClock getSimulationClock()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the clock used by the environment.
        Specified by:
        getSimulationClock in interface Environment<AT extends Agent>
        Returns:
        never null
